name: 中国电商搜索
examples_zh: 在淘宝、京东、拼多多和 1688 同时搜索"露营折叠车"，整理价格区间、销量线索和店铺来源
用这个拼多多商品链接查商品详情，并帮我找 1688 上可能的同款供应商
比较小红书、抖音、天猫上"防晒冰袖"的商品标题、主图卖点和最低到手价
examples_en: Search Taobao, JD, Pinduoduo, and 1688 for "camping folding wagon" and summarize price ranges, sales signals, and seller sources
Use this Pinduoduo product URL to fetch item details and find possible same-product suppliers on 1688
Compare "UV protection arm sleeves" listings across Xiaohongshu, Douyin, and Tmall by title claims, main-image selling points, and lowest visible price
